title: Counter Strikes addons
description: This mod adds a Bomb planting functionality with that you can play a minigame with friends. In this Objective based game the goal is to defuse the bomb if you are part of the special forces. If you are a protester, your goal is to plant and defend the bomb
body:
This mod adds a Bomb planting functionality with that you can play a minigame with friends. In this Objective based game the goal is to defuse the bomb if you are part of the special forces. If you are a protester, your goal is to plant and defend the bomb. The bomb can be defused during the first 35 seconds of it being planted, after 40 seconds the bomb will explode.

**Plans:**
Add more functionality's to make it a more complete minigame.

**Important info:**

40 second bomb timer.

Only in the first 35 seconds can the bomb be defused.

The bomb can only be defused if a Defuse kit is in your inventory.(This will not work if the kit has been placed in a shulker box)

Only 1 bomb can be placed down in the world at a time.

# **Known Issues**

When a bomb gets placed above another one the both get broken and can't be defused.

# **Crafting recipes:**
**Bomb:**

![Crafting recipe of the Bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c093267cef324bee90854a6475bacd843318935.png)

The bomb is quite easy to craft, this can be fortunate if on a roleplay server or if you just want to mes arounf with your friends.

**Defuse Kit:**

![Crafting recipe of the Defuse Kit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ec198c4e837968fe4326f4eef20ecdcde38b1c.png)

Very expensive at the moment. (There might be a change in the feature)
